mnemonics.title: QUAQUA
mnemonics.content: QUAlitative = QUestions Answers (why, how); QUAntitative = QUAntities Numbers (how many, how much)

mnemonics.title: 5 Users Rule
mnemonics.content: Nielsen's 5 users find 85% of problems: 5 fingers on a hand, 85% of problems found

mnemonics.title: Research Ethics
mnemonics.content: ICPRW - Informed Consent, Privacy, Right to Withdraw - I Can Personally Rightly Withdraw
